title: Pipeline Role
description: Defines an IAM role for a CI/CD pipeline, including which accounts it exists in, what it is allowed to assume, and what permissions it has.

name.description: Name of the IAM role. Must be unique within each account it is deployed to.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this role is for.

accounts.description: List of account names (as defined in accounts.yaml) that this role should be created in.

trust.description: Defines which CI/CD identity is allowed to assume this role.

issuer.description: OIDC issuer hostname (without https://). Defaults: token.actions.githubusercontent.com (github), gitlab.com (gitlab). Override for self-hosted instances.

repo.description: The fully qualified repository path as it appears in the OIDC subject claim (e.g. my-group/my-repo).

refs.description: Git refs that are permitted to assume this role. Supports wildcards. Defaults to the repository's default branch only if omitted.

permissions.description: List of IAM policy statements granted to this role.

max_session_duration.description: Maximum session duration in seconds. Defaults to 3600 (1 hour).

effect.description: Whether this statement allows or denies the specified actions.

actions.description: List of IAM actions. Supports wildcards (e.g. s3:*).

resources.description: List of ARNs this statement applies to. Supports wildcards.

conditions.description: Optional IAM condition block. Keys are condition operators, values are maps of condition keys to values.
